title: Grok Agents Marketplace manifest
description: Forward-compatible manifest emitted with every package produced by `grok-build-bridge publish`. The marketplace registry at grokagents.dev consumes this file as the source of truth for an agent's metadata, safety posture, and bridge configuration.

schema_version.description: Pinned manifest schema version. Bump only when fields are added/removed; consumers should refuse manifests they do not understand.

name.description: Slug — same DNS/URL-safe shape as `bridge.yaml#name` so registry URLs stay stable.

version.description: Semantic version of this published agent package. Independent from grok-build-bridge's own version.

description.description: One-line summary, capped at 280 chars so the marketplace card fits a single X post.

author.description: Required author block. Email/url/x are optional but at least the name must be present so attribution is unambiguous.

license.description: SPDX identifier or short licence name. Free-form so non-OSI licences can publish.

bridge.description: Subset of bridge.yaml that the marketplace surfaces in its UI — model, target, and language users care about. Excludes secrets and the full prompt body.

categories.description: Free-form classification tags. The marketplace UI groups by these.

keywords.description: Search keywords. Independent from `categories` — keywords drive search ranking, categories drive navigation.

safety.description: Safety posture at publish time. The registry can reject submissions where `audit_status != "passed"` and `lucas_veto_enabled = false` for X-bound agents.

package.description: What the zip on disk contains. `sha256` is computed over the zip bytes and lets the registry verify the upload matches what was published.

marketplace.description: Registry-side state. Always `draft` at publish time; the registry flips this to `published` once the upload is accepted.
